'''Deneb Both''' was an [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] forester. She made her home on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] and frequented [[Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina/Legends|Chalmun's Cantina]]. Deneb was hoping to leave Tatooine and was often found at the Cantina during [[Ackmena/Legends|Ackmena's]] shift.

==Behind the scenes==
In ''[[Star Wars: The Complete Visual Dictionary]]'', Both was mistakenly identified as Momaw Nadon.

Deneb is derived from the word for "tail" in arabic; the white supergiant star Deneb is located in the "tail" of the constellation Cygnus.
